'''Corvis Minor IV''' was a [[Water/Legends|water]]-rich tropical [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Ciutric Hegemony]]. It produced exotic xenobiological products sold as luxury commodities. It was guarded by the [[Aspiration (Victory-class)|''Aspiration'']].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]'' {{Mo}}
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
